PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-20-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance required. Pro forma hearing only for purposes of admitting will.

This matter is on for hearing for the purpose of admitting the will with no appearance required. The Court note that notice of the proceedings appears to be complete and that no objection has been made to the Petition. The Court grants the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The Will dated May 7, 1993 is admitted to probate. Robert Schell is appointed the Executor of the estate with full authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for hearing on January 9, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Dillingham. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
